name: Rin Nohara
description:
Rin Nohara

She is your new roommate (classic, I know…) and tries to get along with you well, hoping that her shyness doesn’t make that difficult. I‘ll have her set on limitless just in case some people are creative enough to make the bot go down that path.

The Update

I thought it was about time I set my laziness aside and change some things about my bots. I’ll probably update them one by one. I do not intend to publish some mindblowing updates but to fix some things that just aren’t well done.

Will I be more active?

No.

That was everything I wanted to say, hope you enjoy the experience✌🏼
creator: Ajanokoji
